Nashik Kumbh Navigator

Production Privacy Policy Effective Date: July 9, 2026 | Version 1.0.0

Nashik Kumbh Navigator ("we", "our", or "us") is dedicated to protecting the safety and personal information of pilgrims attending the Nashik Kumbh Mela Simhastha 2027. This Privacy Policy details the data we collect, how it is utilized, our security safeguards, and your rights regarding your personal data.

1. Information We Collect

  • Precise Location Data (GPS): Used solely to provide real-time navigation across Ramkund and Kushavarta Ghats, calculate live crowd density heatmaps, and route you away from congested pathways.
  • Authentication Information: If you choose to sign in via Phone OTP or Google Auth, we store your authenticated identifier. Guest mode users can access core navigation without providing personal identifiers.
  • Emergency Contact Information: Phone numbers entered by you for SOS emergency alerts and family reunification features.
  • Crowd Safety Alerts: User-submitted hazard or crowd advisory reports submitted to community safety boards.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • To provide turn-by-turn walking and shuttle navigation across Nashik Kumbh sectors.
  • To aggregate anonymized crowd density metrics to prevent stampedes and bottleneck congestion.
  • To transmit real-time SOS alerts and GPS coordinates to emergency response units (108 / Police 100) upon your explicit tap of the SOS button.

3. Third-Party Services & Data Processors

We partner with industry-standard cloud processors bound by strict security agreements:

  • Google Maps Platform: Rendering secure vector tiles and geographical routing.
  • Google Firebase (Authentication, Cloud Firestore, Cloud Messaging): Encrypted backend storage, authentication, and emergency push notifications.

4. Data Encryption & Security

All data transmitted between your device and our servers is encrypted in transit using Transport Layer Security (TLS 1.3 / HTTPS only). Cleartext HTTP connections are strictly prohibited within the application.

5. Data Retention & Deletion Rights

Pilgrims retain full ownership of their data. You may delete your account, saved emergency contacts, and location history instantly within the app via Profile → Delete Account, or by submitting a deletion request to our privacy team at privacy@nashikkumbh2027.gov.in.

Official Data Protection Officer
Nashik Kumbh Mela Authority & Authority Cell
Email: privacy@nashikkumbh2027.gov.in | Helpline: 1070
